title: Lindmania schidosperma
taxonomy: Lindmania schidosperma is a species of plant in the family Bromeliaceae. It is native to South America. The plant is a terrestrial bromeliad that grows in the understory of tropical forests. Lindmania schidosperma is part of the genus Lindmania, which is a group of bromeliads that are typically found in the Amazon and other parts of South America. Further classification of Lindmania schidosperma may include its placement within a specific tribe of bromeliads.

intro: Lindmania schidosperma, also known as Lindmania, is a species of epiphytic, terrestrial bromeliad native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments.
